items.title: Three detached villas
items.description: Villa 1, Villa 2, and Villa Deluxe — you rent the entire villa just for yourselves, each with 2 bedrooms and space for up to 6 guests.

items.title: Wood-burning fireplace
items.description: A real fireplace in the heart of the living room—for those evenings when it’s snowing outside.

items.title: A kitchen just like home
items.description: A fully equipped kitchen with a dining area—stove, oven, refrigerator, coffee maker, and everything you need for a home-cooked dinner.

items.title: Veranda with a barbecue
items.description: A covered patio with a barbecue—for long evenings outdoors, no matter the weather.

items.title: View of the Rhodope Mountains
items.description: A terrace with a panoramic view of the mountains—morning coffee in the sunshine and breathtaking sunsets.

items.title: 260+ sunny days
items.description: Pamporovo is the sunniest mountain resort in Bulgaria—at an elevation of 1,650 m, with a mild climate and clean air.

items.title: Silence Among the Pine Trees
items.description: Raykovski Livadi — a peaceful pine forest far from the crowds, yet just minutes from the slopes and the town center.

items.title: Wi-Fi and parking
items.description: Free Wi-Fi and parking right outside the door—drive right up and stay connected.
